name: 12_zero_allocation
description: Qualifying holding with allocation=0.0 -> contributes 0 to both diff (0*anything=0) and weight (0 added). Other qualifying holdings unaffected.
derivation: AAPL: alloc=0.0; alloc*(p-v)/v = 0.0*0.10 = 0.0; weight += 0.0. SPY: alloc=0.6; alloc*(p-v)/v = 0.6*(105-100)/100 = 0.6*0.05 = 0.03; weight += 0.6. Sum diff: 0.0 + 0.03 = 0.03. Sum weight: 0.0 + 0.6 = 0.6. Final: (0.03, 0.6). Note: a zero-alloc holding is NOT skipped by the producer (no alloc != 0 guard); it's processed normally but contributes nothing arithmetically.
